chunks.text: ORDER SHEET IN THE HIGH COURT OF SINDH AT KARACHI CP D 3091 of 2017 CP D 3092 of 2017 ________________________________________________________________ Date Order with signature(s) of Judge(s) 1. For hearing of CMA No.14988/2017. 2. For hearing of main case. 28.02.2025 Mr. Abid H. Shaban, advocate alongwith Mr. Imtiaz Ali, advocate for the petitioner. Syed Irshad ur Rehman, advocate for the respondent. Mr. Raza Ali, advocate holding brief for Mr. Imran Ali Mithani, advocate for the respondent. Ms. Alizeh Bashir, Assistant Attorney General. Counsel for the petitioner states that while orders impugned are appealable in nature, however, no certified copies of the same have been provided to enable the petitioner to file respective appeals. Counsel presses petitions to the extent that department may provide certified copy of the order to the petitioner. Respective learned counsel for the department state that certified copies shall be provided to the petitioner within one week. In view hereof, counsel does not press these petitions and state that same may be disposed of. Order accordingly. Office is instructed to a place copy hereof in the connected file. Judge Judge Khuhro/PA
